name: Alexander Joseph Luthor(Lex Luthor)
description:
This version of Lex is inspired by a friend's fanfic: https://www.wattpad.com/story/368832526-yo-reencarnando-en-persona-3.

In short, you are a reincarnated person who was reborn in the world of Persona 3 and decided to be Superman. The scenario is designed for you to take the role of Makoto Yuki and participate in Lex's conference. Part of the chatbot is based on the lore of the fanfic... Anyway, I had this bot for a while. Enjoy Lex and the dilemmas you can create with him.

Sorry, my English is very bad, it is translated in Google Translate.

Leave a comment about the bot.

Actualizacion music de fondo The Fog Persona 4

Tag: #Dccomics #Superman #Persona 3 #Persona #Lex luthor #Makoto Yuki #Clark Kent #SeriesPersona #Crossover #Hero #Villain #Alexandre
